frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields; semver 1.1.0; canonical allowed-tools; owns.patterns matches v1.1 resolved-conflicts table; all composes_with + spawned_by resolve.

description_quality.notes: 483 chars — closest to 200-char target this batch; 8 explicit trigger phrases; specifies both outputs.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 123 lines; single reference (profile-schema.yaml, 75 lines) linked with purpose; no duplication.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered 7-step process; concrete indicator table; testable quality checklist.

coordination.notes: Pattern-ownership matches v1.1 resolved-conflicts table verbatim; conflict-resolution note in body; reciprocal spawned_by.

completeness.notes: Reference exists and is detailed; all process steps map to outputs; off-limits clause explicit.

anti_patterns.notes: No emojis; no hardcoded paths beyond examples; no duplication.

nits.fix: Add compatibility string declaring Bash + Read + Write for repo-root and .claude/
Add one-line note that CLAUDE.md loads into every agent's context

nits.item: Reference is .yaml not .md — parsers scanning references/*.md would miss it
nits.fix: Acceptable; body links explicitly to the .yaml path

nits.item: Steps 4 (Auth) and 5 (CI/CD) feel mandatory but should allow null for projects without them
nits.fix: Note that auth/CI sections become null in profile.yaml when absent

top_fixes.fix: Add rationale for ≤200-line CLAUDE.md cap (agent context budget)
